name: NestFinder
briefDescription: A full-stack real estate listing platform for the Bangladesh property market with role-based dashboards, AI chatbot, booking management, and admin analytics.
challenges: Implementing JWT auth with role-based access, connecting Gemini AI for property suggestions and review summarization, and handling real-time search filtering with pagination.
futurePlans: Add image upload, payment integration, property owner verification, and map-based property search.
shortDescription: Full-stack real estate platform with AI chatbot, JWT auth, and admin dashboard.

name: Scholar Stream
briefDescription: A full-stack scholarship management platform to help students explore, apply, and track scholarships with role-based access and admin tools.
challenges: Integrating role-based access with Firebase, managing dynamic content rendering, and implementing smooth animations for a responsive UI.
futurePlans: Add more analytics dashboards for admins, integrate additional payment options, and improve accessibility.
shortDescription: Scholarship management platform with React, TailwindCSS, and Node.js.

name: FinEase – Personal Finance Management App
briefDescription: A personal finance web app for tracking income, expenses, budgets, and savings goals with interactive charts and reports.
challenges: Implementing real-time transaction updates, interactive charts, and secure authentication with Firebase.
futurePlans: Add multi-currency support, recurring transaction tracking, and predictive expense analytics.
shortDescription: Track income, expenses, and budgets with React and Firebase.
